LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.InitializeDesc: Initialize the living quarters space within the shuttle. This will create a living area inside the shuttle where crew members can rest and work. Colonists in this space cannot participate in piloting the shuttle.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.EnterDesc: Enter the living quarters space of the shuttle - selected colonists will be teleported to the living quarters. Colonists in this space cannot participate in piloting the shuttle.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.ViewMapDesc: Switch perspective to the living quarters space of the shuttle.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.TransferSuccess: {0} personnel successfully transferred to living quarters.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.NoPawnsSelected: Please select at least one colonist to enter the living quarters.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.ExitToMainMapDesc: Return to the main map through the living quarters exit.
LanguageData.WULA.PocketSpace.ExitSuccess: {0} has successfully returned to the main map.
